data.title: Fibernow improves customer service with industry-leading fiber technology, backed by DigitalBridge Group, enhancing customer experience. Onshore Support Center partnership enhances customer service platform.
data.description: In Miami, Fibernow, a prominent fiber broadband provider supported by DigitalBridge Group (NYSE: DBRG), has made significant improvements to its customer service operations. These enhancements aim to match the excellence of the company's cutting-edge fiber technology with superior customer care. Throughout the last year, Fibernow has bolstered its customer service capabilities with various strategic initiatives. These include establishing an Onshore Support Center in collaboration with a local outsourcing provider.

data.title: Moby raises $5M seed round at $30M valuation, led by IA Capital Group, with participation from Alumni Ventures.
data.description: On September 25, 2025, Moby, a platform aiming to make Wall Street-level investing insights more accessible, revealed the completion of a $5 million seed funding round. This funding round resulted in a $30 million valuation for the company. IA Capital Group took the lead in this investment, and other contributors included Alumni Ventures along with several notable angel investors.

data.title: Heart to Heart Hospice becomes largest in Indiana with new Corydon site, expanding services in southern Indiana.
data.description: Heart to Heart Hospice has solidified its position as the leading hospice provider in the state by adding a new location in Corydon. This expansion, announced on September 25, 2025, further establishes Heart to Heart as a major player in the industry. The organization, already known as one of the largest private hospice care providers nationwide, has now extended its services in southern Indiana. With this latest development, Heart to Heart has increased its reach and impact, catering to a greater number of patients in need. The addition of the Corydon site brings the total number of facilities operated by Heart to Heart to a significant figure, exemplifying its commitment to providing quality end-of-life care to as many individuals as possible.

data.title: Worldcoin price forecast indicates $1.45-$1.96 range in next month, with resistance at $2.21. RSI shows neutral zone.
data.description: The forecast for WLD indicates a price range of $1.45 to $1.96 in the next month, with a significant resistance level at $2.21. Analysts have differing perspectives on the Worldcoin forecast, as the Relative Strength Index (RSI) hovers in the neutral range, hinting at potential consolidation in the near future.

data.title: Martha Graham Dance Company celebrates 100th anniversary with En Masse premiering Oct. 4 in LA. Tickets available.
data.description: A significant event is set to take place in Los Angeles on October 4, 2025, as the world premiere of "En Masse," a centennial work by Leonard Bernstein, Christopher Rountree, and Hope Boykin will be showcased. The production will feature live music by Wild Up starting at 8 p.m. Tickets for this special performance can be purchased at TheSoraya.org. This news comes amidst the announcement of the final season of the Martha Graham Dance company.

data.title: Prosegur ranked top 10 by Newsweek as one of World’s Most Trusted Companies for 2025, only security company featured.
data.description: Prosegur, a security company based in Deerfield Beach, Florida, has been recognized as one of the World's Most Trusted Companies for 2025 by Newsweek. They were ranked in the top 10 globally, making them the only security company to receive this distinction. This acknowledgment highlights Prosegur's commitment to trust and excellence in the security industry.

data.title: AI skeptic Guido Reichstadter continues hunger strike into fourth week, while other protestors have stopped.
data.description: Guido Reichstadter, an anthropic protestor, continues his hunger strike, while other AI critics have concluded their public protests.

data.title: SUI price may hit $2.86 short-term and $3.40 by October 2025, showing mixed indicators. (More details)
data.description: There are conflicting signals in the SUI price prediction, with a bearish short-term target of $2.86 and a bullish medium-term forecast projecting SUI to reach $3.40 by October 24th.

data.title: Price prediction: OP expected to reach $0.88 by Oct 2025, but downside risk to $0.60 in near term. Upside potential of 37%.
data.description: According to the latest price forecast, there is a projected increase of 37% bringing the price to $0.88 in the next 4-6 weeks. However, in the short term, there is a risk of the price dropping to $0.60 due to the current downward trend.

data.title: EssilorLuxottica announces Essilor Stellest as the sole FDA-approved spectacle lens in the US market.
data.description: A recent report reveals that the global unemployment rate has reached 6.7%, with over 190 million people worldwide currently without work. The situation is particularly dire in developing countries, where the unemployment rate is as high as 19.7%. In addition, youth unemployment remains a key challenge, with over 64 million young people unable to find work. The report also highlights the impact of the COVID-19 pandemic on employment, with job losses and income reductions affecting a significant portion of the global population. Efforts to address these issues and create more job opportunities are crucial in ensuring economic stability and social well-being.

data.title: FTG's NCIB renewal accepted by TSX, allowing purchase of up to 1,258,669 Common Shares (5% of total) over 12 months.
data.description: FTG announced that the Toronto Stock Exchange has accepted its Notice of Intention to Make a Normal Course Issuer Bid, allowing them to repurchase up to 1,258,669 common shares over the next 12 months. This represents approximately 5% of the 25,173,390 Common Shares outstanding as of September 16, 2025. The renewed NCIB, which had expired in August 2025, will commence on September 30, 2025, and will continue until September 29, 2026, or when the purchases under the bid are completed. FTG trades on the TSX under the symbols FTG and FTGFF.

data.title: Medirom to double "Orb" installations to 200 stores in partnership with "World," founded by Sam Altman and Alex Blania.
data.description: Tokyo-based MEDIROM Healthcare Technologies Inc. is partnering with "World," a protocol created by Sam Altman and Alex Blania, to implement the World ID proof of human authentication device Orb in 100 of its Re.Ra.Ku relaxation studios across Japan by the end of this month. The company, led by CEO Kouji Eguchi and listed on NASDAQ as MRM, plans to extend this deployment to 200 sites nationwide. This initiative represents the largest installation of Orbs in Japan so far, offering increased accessibility to the innovative social infrastructure facilitating individuals to establish their distinct humanness.

data.title: Neogen® renews sponsorship with US Equestrian, supporting since April 2024, providing resources, educational tools.
data.description: Neogen® Corporation (NASDAQ: NEOG) has reaffirmed its partnership with the United States Equestrian Federation, continuing the alliance initiated in April 2024. The commitment involves delivering support, resources, and educational materials to aid the Federation and its members. Having joined forces last year, Neogen has extended its collaboration with US Equestrian, taking steps to create new educational tools accessible to members. This renewed dedication underscores Neogen's ongoing support for the equestrian community and its shared mission with the Federation.
FDA approves PALSONIFY™ for treating Acromegaly in adults, by Crinetics.

data.title: TL1A Binder Market to grow by 2034, with key players like Merck, Roche, Teva, Sanofi, driving advancements in autoimmune diseases.
data.description: The market for TL1A inhibitors is experiencing rapid growth, fueled by substantial investments from major biopharmaceutical firms and increasing optimism about their ability to revolutionize the management of autoimmune diseases, specifically in inflammatory bowel disease (IBD). Key candidates in the mid- to late-stage of development, including those by Merck, are driving this progress.
World leaders gather at the U.N. for 80th General Assembly

data.title: TTEC Digital wins Microsoft AI Business Solutions Inner Circle award for 2025-2026, recognized for outstanding sales and innovation.
data.description: TTEC Digital, based in Austin, Texas, has been recognized by Microsoft for its exceptional sales performance and innovation. The company, part of TTEC Holdings Inc. listed as (NASDAQ:TTEC), is a prominent player in AI-enabled customer experience technology and services. The recognition was granted on September 25, 2025, showcasing TTEC Digital's commitment to excellence in the field.

data.title: TDP announces new Culver's in Faribault, MN. Reiterates trust as development partner. -Sept. 25, 2025.
data.description: In Faribault, Minnesota on September 25, 2025, Tareen Development Partners (TDP), established by Basir Tareen, revealed plans to construct a new Culver's establishment in the area. This initiative highlights TDP's standing as a reliable development collaborator for Culver's, with this upcoming location marking another milestone in their partnership.
